Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Dell, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: DLA Piper LLP
No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: Plaintiff DLA Piper LLP's Application For Writ Of Attachment is granted in the amount of $160,335.76. No opposition has been filed. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
